## Testing

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `npm run build` from `frontend/`
- [ ] Manual local smoke test

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No `.env`, secrets, database files, logs, QR codes, or private account data committed
- [ ] No new trading action, trading unlock, order placement, order cancellation, or order modification behavior
- [ ] Documentation updated if setup, configuration, API behavior, or safety boundaries changed
